content.json:
# PRODAFT USTA — IoC Threat Intelligence

Monitors indicators of compromise (malicious URLs, malware hashes, and phishing sites) ingested from the PRODAFT USTA platform into Microsoft Sentinel Threat Intelligence. Indicators are stored as STIX objects in the `ThreatIntelIndicators` table with `SourceSystem == "PRODAFT USTA"` and appear in the Threat Intelligence blade.

content.query:
ThreatIntelIndicators
| where SourceSystem == "PRODAFT USTA"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Indicators = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| sort by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Indicators ingested over time

content.query:
ThreatIntelIndicators
| where SourceSystem == "PRODAFT USTA"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend IndicatorType = replace_regex(tostring(split(ObservableKey, ":")[0]), @'[\[\]"]', "")
| summarize Count = count() by IndicatorType
content.title: Indicators by type

content.query:
ThreatIntelIndicators
| where SourceSystem == "PRODAFT USTA"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend State = iff(IsActive and (ValidUntil > now() or isempty(ValidUntil)), "Active", "Expired")
| summarize Count = count() by State
content.title: Active vs expired

content.query:
ThreatIntelIndicators
| where SourceSystem == "PRODAFT USTA"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Count = count() by tostring(Confidence)
| sort by Count desc
content.title: Indicators by confidence

content.query:
ThreatIntelIndicators
| where SourceSystem == "PRODAFT USTA"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend IndicatorType = replace_regex(tostring(split(ObservableKey, ":")[0]), @'[\[\]"]', "")
| project TimeGenerated, IndicatorType, ObservableValue, Confidence, ValidUntil, IsActive
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
content.title: Recent indicators
